response.overview: A group of hackers led by Maya, Harun and Shahrul successfully breach a financial institution's system and defraud millions of ringgit from inactive accounts. The cruel and inhumane Komang recruits and threatens them to complete the mystery of a computer program he has held for so long. Saved by Abang Long, who possesses extensive knowledge of Silat, they unravel the mystery. A programmer named Arwin (Umarul Mahdzar Embong) has created a ritual of dark magic worship through a digital programming system to allow him to enhance the effectiveness of the martial arts and spiritual knowledge he has learned. His fellow student Komang (M.Nasir) is entrusted by their teacher Tok Wan (Wan Hanafi Wan Su) to save Arwin. The battle between Komang and Arwin forces Abang Long (Faizal Hussein) to bear the burden and responsibility given by Tok Wan to eliminate the conquest of dark magic. What is the relationship between Abang Long and Komang that Abang Long is willing to risk his life to save Komang?
response.title: Sinopsis Filem Rajawali
